suite.name: TS-F03-US1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Window Position
kw.doc: Sets window position using ``x`` and ``y`` coordinates.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Window Position
kw.doc: Sets window position using ``x`` and ``y`` coordinates.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Create Session
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Create Session' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Create Session' found.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.name: TC01 สร้าง Account Passenger และ Driver ผ่าน Web UI และเข้าหน้า Home

kw.name: Switch Browser
kw.doc: Switches between active browsers using ``index_or_alias``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(), 'เพิ่ม / จัดการข้อมูล')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(), 'เพิ่ม / จัดการข้อมูล')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(), 'เพิ่ม / จัดการข้อมูล')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'เพิ่มรถยนต์คันใหม่')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(., 'เพิ่มรถยนต์คันใหม่')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'เพิ่มรถยนต์คันใหม่')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Honda City' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น Toyota Camry']'.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '1234ขอนแก่น' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น กก 1234 ขอนแก่น']'.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[option[text()='Sedan']]' by label Sedan.

kw.msg: Typing text 'ขาว' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น สีดำ']'.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${ROUTE_CARD} = xpath=//div[contains(@class, 'route-card') and contains(., 'Khon Kaen University') and contains(., 'Tops CentralPlaza')]
kw.arg: xpath=//div[contains(@class, 'route-card') and contains(., 'Khon Kaen University') and contains(., 'Tops CentralPlaza')]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Central Khonkaen' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[2]'.

kw.name: Press Keys

kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[2]

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('ENTER',) to xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[2] element.

kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[2]
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

test.doc: รวบ TC11 (Login) และ TC12 (Delete) เข้าด้วยกันตาม Flow ใช้งานจริง

suite.doc: US1-การ anonymous ฝั่งผู้ใช้ที่เป็น Passenger

errors.msg: Error in file 'E:\SE2_1_PaiNamNae\test\TS-F03\common_resource.resource' on line 3: Importing library 'RequestsLibrary' failed: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'RequestsLibrary' Traceback (most recent call last): None PYTHONPATH: C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts\robot.exe C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\python314.zip C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\DLLs C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314 C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages
